title: The Easiest Silver
description: This mod adds a silver ore, ingot and its smelting recipe ( all are tagged and work in other mods recipes ) nothing else
body:
You can now get silver in vanilla !

There are no armor or tools so that wont error with other mods

You can find silver ONLY in stone ore version around 0 Y to 64 Y

Feel free to use this mod in modpacks
